parsed.summary: The change is a metadata-only bump combined with a prompt-layer UX improvement to the /glm:setup command. It is surgical, low-risk, and shippable. The modification replaces a silent exit when configuration is already healthy with an interactive menu, reusing existing command-line flags already supported by the companion script. All version bumps are consistent across the required files, and the CHANGELOG accurately reflects the scope of the release.
next_steps: Execute the Manual UAT plan (Scenarios A-F) outlined in the release card to validate the AskUserQuestion interactive flow in a live environment.
Run the full local verification suite (npm run ci:local) to ensure all 65 existing tests pass and manifest checks succeed.
Perform the planned /codex:adversarial-review against the full feature branch context before finalizing the merge to main.
